# Sikander Arts

> Karachi's trusted professional painting contractor offering interior, exterior, texture, waterproofing, wood polish, epoxy flooring, and commercial painting services.

Sikander Arts is a professional painting company based in Karachi, Pakistan, founded in 2014. With 10+ years of experience, 500+ completed projects, and 1000+ happy clients, we are one of Karachi's most respected painting contractors.

## Services
- Interior Wall Painting (residential and commercial)
- Exterior Building Painting (weather-resistant, UV-protective)
- Texture & Decorative Painting (Venetian plaster, 3D effects)
- Waterproofing Services (roof, bathroom, basement)
- Wood Painting & Polish (doors, furniture, lacquer)
- Steel & Metal Painting (anti-rust, gates, grills)
- Commercial & Industrial Painting (factories, plazas, hospitals)
- Epoxy Floor Coating (garages, warehouses)
- Stucco & Plaster Work
- Free Color Consultation

## Service Areas in Karachi
DHA, Clifton, Gulshan-e-Iqbal, North Nazimabad, PECHS, Korangi, Bahria Town Karachi, Malir, Saddar, Nazimabad, FB Area, Landhi, Defence, Scheme 33
